form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming off four years break after having had one race start. At debut last start sat on the pace before fading 8th of 13 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 2022 over 1100m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Nominator carrying 57kg at $6. Had five recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial Was second in a 800m barrier trial on February 24 at Hawkesbury. Gelded over the break and can surprise on his home track.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Dual acceptor. Resuming off four years break after having had one race start. At debut last start sat on the pace before fading 8th of 13 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 2022 over 1100m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Nominator carrying 57kg at $6. Had five recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial Was second in a 800m barrier trial on February 24 at Hawkesbury. Gelded over the break and can surprise on his home track.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Laid in under pressure over the final 150m.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, 5th of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Lord Remlap with 58.5kg at $21. Looking elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Dual acceptor. At debut, 5th of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Lord Remlap with 58.5kg at $21. Looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: Resuming today after only having had one start and then had six-and-a-half months break. At debut last start raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 9 at Moe Mdn-Sw on September 23 over 1017m, slow going 4 len behind Kiwi Raider with 55kg at $3.60. Had seven recent trials to get ready for this. Last trial Was second in a 745m trial on March 27 at Randwick. Well bred filly who looks set for a bright return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resuming today after only having had one start and then had six-and-a-half months break. At debut last start raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 9 at Moe Mdn-Sw on September 23 over 1017m, slow going 4 len behind Kiwi Raider with 55kg at $3.60. Had seven recent trials to get ready for this. Last trial Was second in a 745m trial on March 27 at Randwick. Well bred filly who looks set for a bright return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Raced three-wide without cover.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Kelly Barber trained three-year-old filly lining up for first race start. Scored in a recent Kembla Grange trial. Tough debut assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Kelly Barber trained three-year-old filly lining up for first race start. Scored in a recent Kembla Grange trial. Tough debut assignment.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third race start. First start 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on October 11 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Chess Master carrying 55kg at $5.50. Returned from break held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Lord Remlap with 56.5kg at $31. Fitter now and set to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Dual acceptor. Third race start. First start 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on October 11 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Chess Master carrying 55kg at $5.50. Returned from break held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Lord Remlap with 56.5kg at $31. Fitter now and set to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m, corrected after laying in towards the heels of Chess Master.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 3rd in a small field at Wyong Prov 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 21 over 1000m, 4 len behind The Netball Queen with 57kg at $31. Last start eased back early on 3rd in a small field at this track Super Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Stubborn Emmelie carrying 57kg at $61. Has ability and is expected to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Third-up today. Resuming 3rd in a small field at Wyong Prov 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 21 over 1000m, 4 len behind The Netball Queen with 57kg at $31. Last start eased back early on 3rd in a small field at this track Super Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Stubborn Emmelie carrying 57kg at $61. Has ability and is expected to run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped by Stubborn Emmelie.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, slow going 3.5 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $8. Deserves another chance from the inside gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. At debut, made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, slow going 3.5 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $8. Deserves another chance from the inside gate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Ascot Green carrying 58.5kg at $11. Maps well and capable of better.
